frontend_entry.description: Main arcade title/attract/frontend state machine entry. A5 = genesistan_arcade_workram_words on entry.

frame_loop.description: Arcade state machine at 0x03A008. Dispatches to tilemap writers (0x55948→0x55968/0x55990), text writers (0x3BB48, 0x3C3FE), sprite writers (0x41DAE, 0x41F5E, 0x45DFA), and scroll updates (0x55AB4-0x55ACC).

items.role: Secondary text writer: MOVE.W D2,(A2)+ writes tile word to C-window
items.evidence: Inside secondary text writer 0x4A2, called from startup init path before 0x03A008 frontend entry.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped; startup text rendering not needed for Genesis front-end.
items.notes: NOP'd. Part of early boot text renderer.

items.role: Secondary text writer: MOVE.W D3,(A2)+ writes tile word to C-window (attr word)
items.evidence: Paired with 0x0004AA in secondary text writer 0x4A2.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped.

items.role: Boot text fill loop: MOVE.W #0 into C-window text region via A1
items.evidence: Startup init sequence at 0x000514, before 0x03A008 frontend entry. Not in frontend tick loop.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped; writes to C-window text region (page data), Genesis equivalent is VDP nametable which is initialised separately.
items.notes: NOP'd in spec. In boot text fill loop, fires once at startup before frontend tick.

items.role: Boot text fill loop: MOVE.W #0x20 (space) into C-window text region via A1
items.evidence: Paired with 0x000514 in the same boot text fill loop.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped; space-fill of text area, not relevant to Genesis VDP nametable.

items.role: Startup hardware probe: scans C-window and D-window address ranges
items.evidence: Startup probe routine reached before frontend tick; early RTS prevents it from executing. Build 141 applied.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: RTS'd; routine performs arcade HW probe which crashes Genesis. Probe is irrelevant on Genesis.

items.role: Boot callsite: JSR 0x3BB48 (table-driven C-window text writer) from boot sequence
items.evidence: Callsite in startup init. Calls text writer 0x3BB48 which writes to C-window tile region.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped. Even if called, internal writes in 0x3BB48 are NOPped. Boot text irrelevant.

items.role: Text/status writer: MOVE.W D1,(A0)+ where A0 is C-window text base 0xC0975C
items.evidence: Startup text writer. A0 = 0xC0975C (C-window text area). Fires before frontend tick.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped.

items.role: Frontend tick entry point: main arcade title/attract state machine
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() → JMP 0x03A208. This IS the frontend entry. All rendering paths trace from here.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: This is the entry point for the entire frontend tick.
items.notes: Trampoline entry. A5 = genesistan_arcade_workram_words on entry. Not a C/D window routine itself but is the root of all frontend rendering calls.

items.role: Direct C-window write: MOVE.W #0x0032 to 0xC08A52 (sprite frame counter register)
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → frontend state machine → callsite at 0x03A350 (conditional on state).
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped. Sprite frame counter in C-window region. No Genesis equivalent needed for title screen.
items.notes: NOP'd. 0xC08A52 is in PC080SN internal register area, not the nametable. No direct Genesis mapping needed.

items.role: Read probe bypass: CMPI.B #48, 0xC09EA3 + BNE (read from C-window crashes BlastEm)
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → frontend state machine → A5@(0) state check → 0x03A552.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Bypassed via forced BRA. Read from C-window address crashes Genesis (unmapped HW).
items.notes: Opcode replaced to BRA past the CMP. 0xC09EA3 is PC080SN register, not nametable data.

items.role: Direct C-window write: MOVE.B #0x20 to 0xC09EA3 (PC080SN register write)
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → frontend state machine → 0x03A55C (follows 0x03A552 probe path).
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped. PC080SN register not needed on Genesis.
items.notes: NOP'd. 0xC09EA3 is a PC080SN control register, not nametable.

items.role: Callsite 1: JSR 0x55DDC — sprite processing helper called from title state machine
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → frontend state machine 0x03A6xx path → JSR 0x55DDC. Leads to ADDRESS ERROR at 0x055D0A/0x055F0A path.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: NOPped in Build 141. Routine 0x55DDC causes ADDRESS ERROR on Genesis; not needed since sprite rendering is handled by render_frontend_sprite_layer().
items.notes: NOP'd Build 141. Destination routine 0x55DDC unstable on Genesis. Sprites handled by direct VDP path in render_frontend_sprite_layer().

items.role: Direct C-window write: MOVE.W #0x2744 to 0xC08E7A + BRA (PC080SN sprite attr)
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → frontend state machine conditional branch → 0x03A6FE.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped. PC080SN internal sprite attribute area; no direct Genesis equivalent.
items.notes: NOP'd. 0xC08E7A is PC080SN sprite attribute RAM, not nametable or SAT data needed for Genesis.

items.role: Direct C-window write: MOVE.W #0x2744 to 0xC08E66 (PC080SN sprite attr alt path)
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → frontend state machine → 0x03A708 (alternate path from 0x03A6FE).
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped.

items.role: Direct C-window write: MOVE.W D0 to 0xC08C62 (PC080SN sprite data)
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → frontend state machine → 0x03A72A.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped. PC080SN internal sprite RAM.

items.role: Callsite 2: JSR 0x55DDC — sprite processing helper (continuation path)
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → frontend state machine continuation path → JSR 0x55DDC.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: NOPped in Build 141. Same reason as 0x03A6B2.
items.notes: NOP'd Build 141. Sprite rendering handled by render_frontend_sprite_layer().

items.role: Direct C-window write: MOVE.W #0x2749 to 0xC09172 (PC080SN sprite config)
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → frontend state machine → 0x03AAEA.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped. PC080SN internal register.

items.role: Scroll clear: CLR.L 0xC20000 (Y-scroll register layer 0 — read-modify-write, crashes Genesis)
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → frame dispatch area 0x03B098 → BSR path → 0x03ABBA (VBlank/frame init).
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped. CLR.L is read-modify-write on 68000; read phase crashes Genesis. Scroll handled by sync_arcade_scroll_to_vdp() post-tick.
items.notes: NOP'd. This was zeroing the scroll each frame. VDP scroll is now managed by sync_arcade_scroll_to_vdp().

items.role: Scroll clear: CLR.L 0xC40000 (X-scroll register layer 0 — same crash hazard)
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → frame dispatch → 0x03ABC0 (paired with 0x03ABBA).
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped.

items.role: Read probe bypass: CMPI.B #0x43 to 0xC09E87 + BNE (PC080SN register read)
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → frontend state machine → 0x03AC54.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Bypassed; BRA forced to skip. C-window read crashes BlastEm.
items.notes: Opcode replaced to BRA past probe. 0xC09E87 is PC080SN status register.

items.role: Init: word fill loop — clears C-window pages 1 and 3 with 0x0000
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] ← startup_common calls init routines before JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine. Called from 0x3AF5E and 0x3AF6E (init path, not frame loop).
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped. VDP nametable cleared separately by SGDK at startup.
items.notes: NOP'd. Init-only fill loop targeting odd pages of C-window.

items.role: Init: longword fill loop — clears C-window pages (from 0x3AE70, 0x3AE80, 0x3AF38, 0x3AF48)
items.evidence: Called from 0x3AE70, 0x3AE80, 0x3AF38, 0x3AF48 — all init paths before frontend tick entry.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped.

items.role: D-window init: clear 0x100 longwords from 0xD00000 (remapped to shadow via startup_common rule)
items.evidence: In startup init sequence. window_rewrite_rule for startup_common maps D00000-D04000 → genesistan_shadow_d00000_words.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Writes go to genesistan_shadow_d00000_words via window rewrite. Shadow needs initial clear for sprite rendering to work correctly.
items.notes: Remapped to shadow via window_rewrite_rule. Shadow used as intermediate storage for sprites. Works correctly.

items.role: D-window init: clear 0x182 longwords from 0xD00170 (remapped to shadow)
items.evidence: Paired with 0x03AD50 in D-window init sequence.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Shadow clear needed for correct sprite init.

items.role: Control: MOVE.W #0 to 0xC50000 (PC080SN display control register, disable)
items.evidence: Startup init path. Remapped to genesistan_shadow_reg_c50000 via window_rewrite_rule.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped. PC080SN display control not needed on Genesis.
items.notes: NOP'd. 0xC50000 is PC080SN display control register.

items.role: D-window control: MOVE.W #1 to 0xD01BFE (PC090OJ enable — remapped to shadow)
items.evidence: Startup init. Remapped to genesistan_shadow_reg_d01bfe via window_rewrite_rule for startup_common.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Shadow read by render_frontend_sprite_layer() to determine flipscreen state (obj_ctrl & 0x0001).
items.notes: Goes to genesistan_shadow_reg_d01bfe. Read by render_frontend_sprite_layer() for flipscreen logic.

items.role: Control: MOVE.W #1 to 0xC50000 (PC080SN display control, enable)
items.evidence: Startup init path, paired with 0x03ADFE.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped.

items.role: D-window control: MOVE.W #0 to 0xD01BFE (PC090OJ disable — remapped to shadow)
items.evidence: Startup init, disables D-window after init.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Shadow read by sprite renderer for flipscreen.

items.role: Control: MOVE.W #0 to 0xC50000 (PC080SN display control, init disable)
items.evidence: Called directly from genesistan_run_original_startup_common() in startup_trampoline.s.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped.
items.notes: NOP'd. Entry point of startup_common init sequence.

items.role: D-window control: MOVE.W #0 to 0xD01BFE (PC090OJ disable in init path)
items.evidence: In startup_common init path near 0x03AE86.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Shadow read by sprite renderer.

items.role: Status writer: MOVE.W D0,(A0) where A0 = 0xC09376+offset (PC080SN text/status area)
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → frontend state machine → text/status writer path → 0x03B1CC.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped. Text status writes silenced — text overlay not yet implemented on Genesis.
items.notes: NOP'd. Silencing status/score text. Needed eventually for HUD/score display during gameplay.

items.role: C-window helper: MOVE.W #1,(A0)+ where A0=0xC0887C (sprite/tile data region)
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → frontend state machine → sprite-related helper → 0x03B47A.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped. PC080SN sprite attribute data, not VDP nametable.

items.role: C-window helper: MOVE.W #0x2744,(A0) where A0=0xC0887C
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → frontend state machine → sprite helper → 0x03B47E (paired with 0x03B47A).
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped.

items.role: C-window helper: MOVE.W #0x274B,(A0) where A0=0xC08D6E+offset
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → frontend state machine → sprite helper → 0x03B49A.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped.

items.role: C-window helper: MOVE.W #0,(A0)+ where A0=0xC08D6C+offset
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → frontend state machine → animation helper → 0x03B572.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped.

items.role: C-window helper: MOVE.W D0,(A0) where A0=0xC08D6E+offset
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → frontend state machine → animation helper → 0x03B5F6.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped.

items.role: Table-driven C-window text writer dispatcher: writes tile words and attribute words to C-window nametable (text/HUD layer). Called from multiple state machine paths.
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → state machine → BSR 0x03BB48 (called from 0x3B098 area and multiple text-drawing paths).
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Internal write instructions NOPped (0x03BB66, 0x03BB68, 0x03BB74, 0x03BB76). Dispatcher code still runs but produces no output.
items.notes: CRITICAL GAP: All text writes are silenced. Text overlay (coin msg, GAME OVER, credits, attract mode text) is missing from frontend. Needs opcode_replace of write instructions to emit VDP_setTileMapXY calls. A1 holds target C-window address, D2/D0 hold tile and attr words.

items.role: Text writer 0x3BB48 normal-write path: MOVE.W D2,(A1)+ (tile word)
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → 0x03BB48 → 0x03BB66 (normal character write loop).
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped. Must be replaced with VDP nametable write to restore text.
items.notes: NOP'd. The key write site for text tile data in 0x3BB48 normal path.

items.role: Text writer 0x3BB48 normal-write path: MOVE.W D0,(A1)+ (attr word)
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → 0x03BB48 → 0x03BB68 (paired attr write).
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped.
items.notes: NOP'd. Attribute word write paired with 0x03BB66.

items.role: Text writer 0x3BB48 space-fill path: MOVE.W D2,(A1)+ (tile attr — inverted text path)
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → 0x03BB48 → 0x03BB74 (space-fill / inverted render path, D1 holds space char).
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped.

items.role: Text writer 0x3BB48 space-fill path: MOVE.W D1,(A1)+ (space char 0x20)
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → 0x03BB48 → 0x03BB76.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped.

items.role: Second C-window text writer: writes character tiles to C-window FG page (0xC08000 area)
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → state machine → text/score paths → 0x03C3FE. A1 = 0xC08000 + sub_table_offset.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Internal writes NOPped (0x03C42A, 0x03C446, 0x03C44A). Silenced.
items.notes: CRITICAL GAP: Second text writer for FG layer text (HUD/score). All writes silenced. Needs same treatment as 0x3BB48 — replace write instructions with VDP nametable writes to BG_A.

items.role: Text writer 0x3C3FE: MOVE.W D7,(A1) — fires first each iteration before char write
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → 0x03C3FE → 0x03C42A.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped.

items.role: Text writer 0x3C3FE: MOVE.W D1,(A1) — character tile write path
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → 0x03C3FE → 0x03C446.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped.

items.role: Text writer 0x3C3FE: MOVE.W #0x20,(A1) — space fill path
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → 0x03C3FE → 0x03C44A.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped.

items.role: Sprite data: MOVE.W D1 to 0xC08C66 (PC080SN sprite data RAM)
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → frontend state machine → sprite-related sub-routine → 0x03D04C.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped (patcher used ROM-form bytes). PC080SN internal RAM, no Genesis mapping.
items.notes: NOP'd. PC080SN sprite attribute RAM at 0xC08C66.

items.role: D-window object writer: writes sprite data from A5+0x508 to PC090OJ D00000 region (multiple blocks)
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → state machine → sprite dispatch → JSR 0x041DAE. Now RTS'd at entry.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: RTS'd at entry. render_frontend_sprite_layer() handles all sprite output via direct VDP SAT writes.
items.notes: RTS'd (Build 139). Replaced by render_frontend_sprite_layer() which reads workram descriptor blocks and writes to Genesis VDP SAT directly.

items.role: D-window sprite copy: copies sprite attrs from A5+0x11B2 (18 entries) and A5+0x0170 (4 entries) to D003C0 / D002E0
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → state machine → sprite dispatch → JSR 0x041F5E. Now RTS'd at entry.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: RTS'd at entry. render_frontend_sprite_layer() uses same workram blocks (A5+0x11B2, A5+0x0170) directly.
items.notes: RTS'd (Build 139). Workram blocks at A5+0x11B2, A5+0x0170 are the confirmed source for render_frontend_sprite_layer().

items.role: D-window alternate sprite writer: writes sprites from A5+0x5C8 / A5+0x748 to D00460 / D00170
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → state machine → alternate sprite dispatch → JSR 0x045DFA. Now RTS'd at entry.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: RTS'd at entry. Sprites handled by render_frontend_sprite_layer().

items.role: Pointer init: MOVE.L #0xC08000 to abs(0x10D0A0) — stores FG-page base into workram row-ptr slot
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → game init path (called from title init sequence) → 0x0503EC.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped. Tilemap rendering no longer uses these workram row pointers; hooks read ROM directly.
items.notes: NOP'd. Part of broken workram row-ptr chain superseded by Build 140 direct ROM read.

items.role: Pointer init: MOVE.L #0xC00000 to abs(0x10D0F8) — stores BG-page base into workram row-ptr slot
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → game init path → 0x0503F6.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped.

items.role: Pointer init: MOVE.L #0xC08000 to abs(0x10D0A4) — duplicate FG-page store
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → game init → 0x050400.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped.

items.role: Pointer init: MOVE.L #0xC00000 to abs(0x10D0F8) — duplicate BG-page store
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → game init → 0x05040C.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped.

items.role: Pointer init: MOVE.L #0xC08000 to abs(0x10D0A0) — 3rd duplicate FG-page store
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → game init → 0x050416.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped.

items.role: Pointer init: MOVE.L #0xC0BF00 into D0, MOVE.L D0 to abs(0x10D0A4) — advanced FG-page store
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → game init → 0x050420.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped.

items.role: C-window base RTS: MOVEA.L #0xC08000,A0 — entry of routine that builds C-window row pointer
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → game engine → routine at 0x052858 (would set A0 to C-window FG base). RTS'd at entry.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: RTS'd at entry. Tilemap reads ROM directly; row-ptr chain is retired.

items.role: C-window base RTS: second MOVEA.L #0xC08000,A0 entry (alternate path)
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → alternate game engine path → 0x052974. RTS'd.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: RTS'd.

items.role: C-window pointer store: ADDIL #0xC08000,D1 + MOVE.L D1,A5@(0x10A4) — FG base into workram layer-1 slot
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → title init path → 0x0556F2.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped.

items.role: C-window pointer store: second ADDIL #0xC08000,D0 + MOVE.L D0,A5@(0x10A4) — duplicate FG base store
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → title init → 0x05577E.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped.

items.role: C-window pointer store: ADDIL #0xC08000,D0 + MOVE.L D0,A5@(0x10A0) — FG tilemap base into workram
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → title init path → routine at 0x05577E area → 0x055818.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped. A5@(0x10A0) is now never read by tilemap hook (hook reads ROM directly).

items.role: Workram modifier: loop clearing workram area (0x10D000-related), frame counter reset

items.safe_to_nop_reason: Already NOPped. Modifies workram staging buffers that are retired (Build 140 direct ROM read).

items.role: Tilemap row-ptr setup: reads 0x10D000 table, fills 0x10D040/0x10D080 with tile codes and attr pointers
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → would be called from 0x55948 dispatch before plane writers. NOPped in spec.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: NOPped. Build 140 bypass: tilemap hooks read ROM tile codes directly, bypassing this broken staging chain entirely.
items.notes: NOPped. Root cause analysis in Build 140 log: even if un-NOPped, 0x10D040/0x10D080 writes go to wrong addresses (not remapped in game_engine_040000).

items.role: Tilemap dispatch: checks mode (A5@(0x10A8)), BSR to plane_a (0x55968) or plane_b (0x55990), then BSR post-render hook (0x558A2)
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → game engine render path → 0x055948 (dispatch). Called each frame during frontend tick.
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Not patched; needed to dispatch to hooked plane writers.
items.notes: The dispatch runs unmodified. mode = A5@(0x10A8) = workram[0x854]. Currently always 0, so only plane_a fires. FG layer (plane_b) never renders until mode becomes non-zero. Mode investigation needed.

items.role: Plane_a tilemap writer: iterates 16 rows of BG layer 0 tiles, writes to C-window (0xC00000-page 0). Hooked to genesistan_hook_tilemap_plane_a → VDP BG_B nametable writes.
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → 0x055948 → BSR 0x055968 (mode==0 path).
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Replaced by JSR to genesistan_hook_tilemap_plane_a + RTS. C hook writes VDP nametable directly.
items.notes: Build 140: hook reads tile codes from ROM at 0x16B1C + i*0x22C0 + frame_ctr*64. Writes to BG_B (arcade BG layer 0). frame_ctr = workram[0x9F]. Tile cache handles DMA on miss.

items.role: Plane_b tilemap writer: iterates 16 rows of FG layer 1 tiles, writes to C-window (0xC08000-page 2). Hooked to genesistan_hook_tilemap_plane_b → VDP BG_A nametable writes.
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → 0x055948 → BSR 0x055990 (mode!=0 path). Currently never fires (mode always 0).
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Replaced by JSR to genesistan_hook_tilemap_plane_b + RTS.
items.notes: Build 140: hook writes to BG_A (arcade FG layer 1). GAP: mode (workram[0x854] = A5@(0x10A8)) is always 0 so this path never fires. Need to confirm when mode changes and whether FG layer is used during title sequence.

items.role: Scroll write: MOVE.W A5@(0x10EE) to 0xC20000 — Y-scroll layer 0 to PC080SN scroll register
items.evidence: genesistan_run_original_frontend_tick() [startup_trampoline.s] → JMP 0x03A208 (arcade 0x03A008) → arcade frontend state machine → tilemap render area → post-tilemap scroll update at 0x55AB4 (fires each frame after tilemap dispatch).
items.safe_to_nop_reason: Currently NOPped AND the shadow is never populated. GAP: scroll is stuck at 0,0. The source value A5@(0x10EE) = workram[0x877] is set by game code. Either un-NOP + remap to shadow, or read workram directly in sync_arcade_scroll_to_vdp().
items.notes: CRITICAL GAP: scroll shadow is never populated. game_engine_040000 range does NOT remap 0xC20000 to scroll shadow (maps to cwindow_null). Fix: read workram[0x877] directly in sync_arcade_scroll_to_vdp() instead of relying on shadow.
